chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No.S-54 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A No.330/2026. 3. For hearing of main case. 16.02.2026 Mr. Tehseen Ahmed H. Qureshi, advocate a/w petitioners No.1 & 5. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Assistant A.G Sindh a/w Inspector Asghar Khan of PS Ghulam Nabi Shah and Inspector Maqsood Ahmed of PS Pithoro. = Instant petition U/A 199 of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 is filed to seek direction to the official respondents not to cause harassment to the petitioners at the behest of private respondent(s). Today, Mr. Nabi Bux Narejo advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the private respondents which is taken on record and states that neither the private respondents have caused harassment to the petitioners nor intend to do so in future. Learned A.A.G filed parawise comments/statements on behalf of official respondents No.3 to 10, which are taken on record and submits that protection is fundamental right of the petitioners and the same will be provided to them in accordance with law. Police officials present in court also state that they shall act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioners as and when required. Upon such statement, counsel for the petitioners express his satisfaction and seeks disposal of the case. In view of above, the petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. This order shall not be construed to have established any right of the petitioners in respect of any property or any factual controversy.

In view of above, the petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. This order shall not be construed to have established any right of the petitioners in respect of any property or any factual controversy. Office to communicate this order to the concerned S.S.P for information and compliance. JUDGE *Faisal*
